verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies [3x Luck] Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, dateModified 06/10/2026, max level 20000, and says the community server carries exclusive reward codes. It does not expose current code strings in accessible HTML.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies the Official Discord Server of Shadowrise Devs Sailor Piece with about 1,432,483 members. Channel messages such as code-list are not exposed in public HTML, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board last activity is 2026-04-26; Actives Codes card was last active 2026-02-28 and still lists stale early codes. It does not contain the current June active set and was not used as current active proof.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 11, 2026. Lists 13 active codes: the three June 9 additions, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. Gives exact rewards for these rows and level requirements for many. Lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired, creating a conflict.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 11, 2026. Lists the three June 9 additions plus several retained reward-family codes active, including SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG. It lists SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, and MASTERY expired, and has reward conflicts for 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM/FREECODEFORYALLL2, so it is active-state support plus conflict context rather than decisive reward proof.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated June 9, 2026. Lists 13 active codes including the three June 9 additions, 12,500-level reward-family codes, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired, creating an active-state conflict.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 9, 2026. Lists the three June 9 additions with exact reward bundles and keeps SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG active. It places RAIDS in expired, creating an active-state conflict.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 9, 2026. Lists 13 active codes including the three new codes and RAIDS; lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive. It says new codes are posted in the official Sailor Piece Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 9, 2026. Lists 14 active codes, including the three June 9 additions, RAIDS, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG. Rewards are generic for some rows, so it is active-state support rather than exact reward proof for every code.

decisions.reason: Kept active because Pocket Tactics and PCGamesN updated June 11 and list it active, while June 9 GamesRadar/Beebom/Pro Game Guides/Destructoid also list it current. Pocket Tactics and Beebom support the stored reward bundle; level 12500 is supported by Pocket Tactics/GamesRadar.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN, Beebom, and Destructoid list it active/current; GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Pocket Tactics list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Destructoid list it active/current; Beebom lists it expired and PCGamesN omits it.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or stronger current-source expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Beebom, Pro Game Guides, and Destructoid list these active/current; PCGamesN lists them expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not move based on one conflicting source without official or broader current expiry proof.
